tasks.label: Run Verilog Simulation (Phase 1)
tasks.command: iverilog -g2012 -o simulation_bin.out ELEC374_PHASE1/datapath.v ELEC374_PHASE1/registers/*.v ELEC374_PHASE1/memory/*.v ELEC374_PHASE1/bus/BUS.v ELEC374_PHASE1/alu/*.v ELEC374_PHASE1/tb/datapath_tb.v ELEC374_PHASE2/branch_condition.v && vvp simulation_bin.out && gtkwave waveforms.vcd
